prompt: Create a Python CLI tool using docker-py that manages Docker containers. I need a watch command that listens to the Docker events stream and triggers a callback whenever a container dies with a non-zero exit code.

Implement dark mode in SvelteKit without the flash of incorrect theme. Use an inline script in the head of app.html to check localStorage and matchMedia preference and set the CSS class before the framework hydrates.

Design a SQL query for Reddit-style hierarchical comment threads using a recursive CTE to fetch 5 levels deep, sorted by net score at each level. No OFFSET/LIMIT - and I need help optimizing it with the right composite index.

Implement a Python function to clean CSV data where one column has nested JSON and another has mixed date formats (DD/MM/YYYY and YYYY-MM-DD). Normalize all dates to ISO 8601 and flatten the JSON keys into new columns.

I want to develop a Linux kernel module that adds a new system call allowing a userspace process to hide a specific PID from /proc. I need to manipulate the task_struct carefully using RCU locking to avoid destabilizing the system.

Develop a boot-time diagnostic routine in C with marching ones and marching zeros RAM tests to detect stuck-at and coupling faults. The test needs to be non-destructive - save the content being tested to a register, run the test, then restore it.

Develop a Python script for Excel generation with pandas and openpyxl that can handle a million rows without loading everything into RAM. Use chunking to read the source CSV and stream aggregated results into the Excel file row by row.

Implement a memory-mapped I/O driver in C with a macro-based abstraction layer that lets the same code compile for both physical hardware (writing to raw pointers) and PC simulation (writing to a byte array) for unit testing.

Write a Python script to batch convert images using Pillow with multiprocessing to use all CPU cores. It should detect corrupt images with truncated headers and move them to a quarantine folder instead of crashing.

Generate a C# ASP.NET Core web API boilerplate using vertical slice architecture. Each feature like CreateOrder should be self-contained in a single folder with its own controller, command, handler, and DTOs.
Develop a Python tool to analyze a 50GB log file using mmap so it doesn't load into RAM. Parse lines with a compiled regex and stream aggregate counts like error rate per minute to stdout.

Implement a Python script for calling an unstable API with exponential backoff and jitter. On 429 or 503 responses, wait base * 2^retries + random_ms, stop after 5 retries, and raise a custom MaxRetriesExceeded exception that preserves the original error context.
Create a React app with Suspense using the render-as-you-fetch pattern where API calls start before rendering the component. Use an ErrorBoundary to handle failures gracefully with a retry button.

Design a CAN bus stack in C with a software filter mechanism. The hardware filter accepts a broad range of IDs, but the ISR needs to efficiently binary search a sorted whitelist to decide whether to process or discard each message.

Develop a Vue 3 app with Composition API and create a useFetch composable that supports caching, request deduplication, and aborting with AbortController if the component unmounts before the request finishes.

Help me implement a round-robin load balancer in raw Node.js without any proxy libraries. It should spawn child processes for workers and have a health check that removes any child from rotation if it doesn't respond to a ping within 200ms.

Provide a Python data science project boilerplate using DVC for data version control. Large datasets should be stored in S3/GCS with only .dvc metadata in Git. Include a dvc.yaml pipeline that reproduces training steps.

I need to implement SSR in SvelteKit with streamed hydration - send the HTML shell immediately, then stream in the heavy chart data as it resolves. Show me how to handle database timeouts gracefully in the stream without breaking the HTML.

I want to create a TypeScript utility library for runtime type checking with a Result type pattern like Rust has. It should force consumers to handle both Success and Error cases, using mapped types to infer the error structure from the input schema.

Create a serverless API with AWS Lambda and DynamoDB using single table design. I need to model Users, Orders, and Products in one table with proper partition and sort keys so I can fetch all orders for a user and all items in an order with single queries.

Write a Python file watcher daemon using watchdog with debouncing - if a file is saved 5 times in one second, only trigger processing once after things settle. Handle the differences in file locking behavior between Windows and Linux.

Build a Flutter mobile app boilerplate with clean architecture layers and BLoC for state management. Include a flavor setup for Dev, Staging, and Prod environments with different API endpoints and app icons.

Implement complex state management in SvelteKit with a global store that syncs with localStorage but only on the client side. Handle the SSR mismatch by checking the browser environment flag before reading storage.

Develop a design system with Bootstrap 5 and SCSS with a theming API using CSS custom properties on top of Bootstrap's Sass map. Allow switching the primary color at runtime with JavaScript without recompiling SCSS.

Help me design a microservice architecture for a global e-commerce site. I need to implement the saga pattern for handling distributed transactions across Order, Inventory, and Payment services, including the rollback logic if Payment fails after Inventory is already reserved.

Write an Express middleware that integrates with Prometheus without using express-prometheus-bundle. I need to manually implement a Histogram for request duration buckets and a Counter for status codes, with the /metrics endpoint protected by basic auth.

Provide a NestJS boilerplate with hybrid application support for both HTTP and microservices. It should listen on port 3000 for REST and port 5000 as a gRPC server, sharing the same service layer between both transports.

Provide a FastAPI boilerplate implementing CQRS with separate read models and write operations. Use Alembic for migrations and include a pre-commit hook that ensures no database models are committed without a corresponding migration.

Create a Dockerized Flask boilerplate with Gunicorn behind Nginx. The Docker Compose setup needs a healthcheck that curls /health and auto-restarts after 3 failures. Configure logrotate for access logs.

I'm building a PWA with a network-first caching strategy. I need custom BackgroundSync logic that queues POST requests like "Like" actions to IndexedDB when offline and replays them when back online, handling any 409 conflict errors that might come up.

Design a Python daemon that monitors system resources and specifically calculates CPU steal time and I/O wait by reading /proc/stat. If memory usage exceeds 90%, it should identify the process with the highest OOM score and log its PID and command line.
Implement server-side data prefetching in Angular using TransferState. The server fetches data and embeds it in HTML JSON, and the client reads this on startup to avoid the double-fetch problem.
Implement a lock-free ring buffer in C for single-producer/single-consumer using C11 stdatomic.h memory barriers. It should support overwriting the oldest data when full in circular mode.

Build a minimalistic reparenting window manager for X11 in C using Xlib. When a new window is created, create a frame window with title bar and borders, set the new window as its child, and handle SubstructureRedirectMask events.

Write C code for an STM32 to interface with a temperature sensor over I2C without using blocking I/O or HAL_Delay. Use DMA to read sensor data into a circular buffer in the background, only triggering an interrupt when the buffer is half full.

Build a multi-layout system in Next.js using parallel routes and intercepting routes to create a modal that opens on top of the current page when clicked but acts as a standalone page if the URL is opened directly.

Create a GitHub Actions pipeline for a monorepo with Angular and NestJS. It should use a matrix strategy to test on Node 18, 20, and 22, with path filtering so backend builds only trigger for /backend changes. Also build and push a Docker image to ECR on passing tags.

Can you create a Holy Grail CSS layout using only CSS Grid and Container Queries? It needs a collapsible sidebar and sticky footer, but I don't want to use any media queries - everything should adapt based on container width.

Help me develop a static site generator in Python with a plugin system where users can write scripts to hook into pre-build and post-build lifecycle events. Use Jinja2 for templating and Markdown for content.

I'm setting up a headless CMS with Strapi and Gatsby and need incremental static regeneration. When content is updated in Strapi, a webhook should trigger a rebuild of just that specific page in Gatsby, not the entire site.

I need to build a scalable REST API with Node.js and Express for a multi-tenant SaaS app. It should use a database-per-tenant setup with a shared connection pool, and I want middleware that figures out the tenant from the subdomain and switches the Postgres schema for each request.

Build a Flask REST API with token revocation using a Redis blocklist. When a user logs out, store the JWT's JTI in Redis with a TTL matching the token's remaining validity, and have the auth middleware check this blocklist.

Can you help me create a custom React hook called useFormValidator for a trading form that needs to be super fast? I want it to use Zod for validation but run the validation in a Web Worker so it doesn't block the UI when users are typing quickly.

Help me write a GraphQL server with Apollo and PostgreSQL that uses cursor-based pagination for an infinite scroll feed. I also need to solve the N+1 problem for nested fields like Users -> Posts -> Comments using dataloader.

Build a React commenting system with Firebase that supports infinite nested replies. Store comments in a flat Firestore collection with parentId and path strings, reconstructing the tree on the client recursively.
Develop a minimal x86 bootloader in assembly that switches from 16-bit real mode to 32-bit protected mode. Set up the GDT, enable the A20 line, and jump to a C function at 0x1000.
Build a custom animation library using the FLIP technique manually in JavaScript to animate shared layout changes like reordering a grid smoothly at 60fps without layout thrashing.

I need a rate limiter middleware for FastAPI using the sliding window log algorithm instead of fixed window. It should use Redis sorted sets to store timestamps with atomic Lua transactions for accuracy under high concurrency.

Generate a Next.js + Prisma + Tailwind CSS boilerplate configured for multi-tenancy. Include middleware that rewrites requests based on subdomain and configure Prisma to use separate connection pools for each tenant.

Write low-level C code to manage power states in embedded Linux. Interact with /sys/power/state to implement suspend-to-RAM that only wakes on a specific GPIO edge event, making sure to fsync file descriptors before suspension.

Implement RBAC in NestJS using custom decorators and guards. I need dynamic permissions where a role's permissions are fetched from Redis on every request, so an admin can revoke access instantly without requiring the user to log out and back in.

I need a custom Webpack plugin that analyzes build assets and fails the build if any JavaScript chunk exceeds 200KB gzipped. It should also output a JSON report showing which dependencies are contributing most to the bloat.

Design a Vue.js app with page transitions where the outgoing page slides left and incoming slides from the right. Handle scroll position - restore to top for new pages while keeping the old page's scroll locked during animation.

Provide a Ruby on Rails API boilerplate with Sidekiq for background jobs. Implement idempotency key middleware so if a client sends the same POST request twice due to network retry, return the cached response instead of reprocessing.
Build me a collaborative text editor using Yjs or a custom CRDT implementation for handling multi-user merges. It shouldn't use any central locking - just eventual consistency.

Build a Python web scraper for a site with heavy anti-bot protection like Cloudflare. Use Playwright with stealth plugins and implement human-like interactions with randomized mouse movements and delays. Include CAPTCHA solving using Tesseract or a third-party API.

Build a Next.js app with internationalization that uses split-locale loading. Don't bundle all languages in the main JS - dynamically import just the specific locale JSON based on the Accept-Language header on the server and hydrate the client with only that data.
Create C firmware for a PWM motor driver with a PID controller that has anti-windup protection for the integral term. The controller needs to run at exactly 1kHz using a hardware timer interrupt.

Create a Kotlin Ktor server boilerplate using Koin for dependency injection. Implement a feature toggle mechanism where features can be enabled or disabled via a hot-reloadable config file without restarting the server.

Create a Python asyncio application with a bounded semaphore limiting concurrent outgoing requests to 100. Handle task cancellation properly so that when the user hits Ctrl+C, all sockets close and pending writes flush before exiting.

Help me build a secure firmware update mechanism where the image is signed with Ed25519 and the bootloader verifies against a public key in OTP memory. I need A/B partitioning with a rollback counter to prevent anti-replay attacks from downgrading to vulnerable versions.

Create a Rust web service boilerplate using Actix-web with hexagonal architecture. Define core business logic as pure Rust traits independent of HTTP, with Actix handlers as adapters. Use sqlx for compile-time checked SQL.

Build a cross-platform desktop app with Electron where all CPU-intensive work like file encryption runs in a Node.js Worker Thread. Use MessagePort to communicate between the Renderer and Worker, bypassing the Main process to keep the UI responsive.

Build a Python microservice for image recognition with TensorFlow Lite. Keep the model in memory as a singleton and implement batching middleware that collects incoming requests for 50ms and feeds them to the GPU/CPU as a single tensor batch.

Design an efficient circular queue in C for high-frequency sensor data using C11 atomic types. It needs a peek operation that lets the consumer read without advancing the tail pointer, and make sure head and tail indices are cache-line aligned to prevent false sharing.

Generate a Vue 3 + Pinia full-stack boilerplate with module federation. Structure it so Dashboard and Settings are separate micro-frontends that deploy independently but load into the main shell app at runtime.

Implement a cooperative task scheduler in C from scratch without FreeRTOS. Maintain a linked list of function pointers as tasks and write a yield() function that saves CPU context to a custom stack and switches to the next task.

Build an Elixir Phoenix boilerplate with Phoenix LiveView for a real-time dashboard. Implement PubSub where an external Python cron job pushes data to Redis and the Phoenix server broadcasts to all connected LiveView clients.

Design an interrupt-driven UART protocol for ARM Cortex-M with a packet protocol using start byte 0xAA, length, payload, and CRC8 checksum. The ISR should build packets byte by byte and only set a flag for the main loop when a valid checksum-verified packet is complete.

Build a simple Unix shell in C with job control supporting Ctrl+Z, fg, and bg commands. Manage process groups with setpgid and terminal control signals with tcsetpgrp so background processes don't steal terminal input.
Create a responsive Tailwind CSS component library with a polymorphic Button component that can render as an anchor or button tag depending on props, with ARIA roles adjusting automatically.
Create a Django boilerplate with Django Channels and Redis for WebSockets. Implement a chat app with presence showing who's online, using daphne as the ASGI server.

Write a process scheduler for a custom OS using a multilevel feedback queue. New processes start in the highest priority queue with short time slices and get demoted if they use their full slice without blocking. Add priority boosting every N seconds to prevent starvation.
Build an Angular app with NgRx implementing optimistic UI updates. When a user deletes an item, remove it from the store immediately, then rollback and show a toast if the API call fails.

Generate a C++ Qt desktop application boilerplate with the Model-View-Delegate pattern. Fetch data from a REST API in a background QThread, update a custom QAbstractListModel, and render in QML without freezing the GUI.
Create a bare-metal ARM Cortex-A application with startup assembly code that initializes stack pointers for different processor modes (IRQ, FIQ, SVC), zeros out the .bss section, and jumps to main().

Create a Python chatbot with spaCy that does intent classification and named entity recognition. It needs to handle cases where users provide multiple entities in one sentence like "Book a flight from NY to London and a hotel in Paris" and map them to structured JSON.
Design a React drag-and-drop interface with dnd-kit combined with a virtual list. Handle reordering items that aren't currently rendered in the DOM due to scrolling.

Generate a React Native boilerplate with Redux Toolkit Query and offline-first architecture. Configure redux-persist to save to AsyncStorage and include a network connectivity hook that pauses mutations when offline and replays them when online.

Implement a Python ETL pipeline with Airflow or Prefect that supports backfilling past dates. Include a dead letter queue where rows that fail schema validation get saved to S3 for manual inspection while the rest of the batch continues processing.

Create a device driver in Rust for a custom PCI device using the kernel crate. Implement interrupt handling with a top half that acknowledges the interrupt and wakes a bottom half threaded IRQ for the heavy data processing.

Write a high-performance reverse proxy in Rust using Tokio for async I/O. It needs connection pooling to the upstream server and a circuit breaker that stops forwarding if the upstream error rate exceeds 10% in a one-minute window.

I need to interface with an external EEPROM using bit-banging I2C in C since my MCU has no hardware I2C. Implement clock stretching support where the master waits if the slave holds SCL low, and add a timeout mechanism so the system doesn't hang if the line gets stuck.
Create a responsive Beercss grid system with a Pinterest-style masonry layout using CSS Grid with row-span calculations in JS. Provide a fallback for browsers that don't support native masonry.

Implement FreeRTOS tasks to manage multiple sensors using task notifications instead of binary semaphores for better performance. One high-priority task should act as a gatekeeper for the I2C bus, processing requests from lower-priority tasks via a queue.

Build a bootloader in C for an AVR microcontroller that accepts firmware over UART, verifies a CRC16 checksum, and writes to application flash page by page. It needs to handle power loss mid-write without bricking using double buffering or a golden image.

Build a Go + gRPC microservice boilerplate with OpenTelemetry tracing. Middleware should inject trace IDs into every gRPC context, configure a Jaeger exporter, and include a Makefile that generates Go code from proto files.

Create an Express + TypeScript + MongoDB API boilerplate with repository pattern and dependency injection using InversifyJS. Include a rigid error handling hierarchy with AppError vs DomainError and a global handler that sanitizes stack traces.

Build me a custom memory allocator in C for an embedded system using a slab allocator scheme for fixed-size objects like 32B, 64B, and 128B to eliminate fragmentation. Include a coalescing function that merges adjacent free blocks when a page empties and returns it to the OS via sbrk or mmap.

Build a SvelteKit boilerplate with end-to-end testing using Playwright. Include a GitHub Actions workflow that spins up an ephemeral preview environment, runs E2E tests against it, and posts results as a PR comment.

I'm trying to build a data visualization dashboard with D3.js and SvelteKit that can handle 50,000 data points at 60fps. I think I need to use Canvas instead of SVG for rendering but keep D3 for the scales and axes. Also need a quadtree for detecting what the user is hovering over.

I want to build a WebSocket chat app with Next.js and Prisma that has end-to-end encryption. I'm thinking of using something like the Signal Protocol or a simplified Double Ratchet algorithm so the server only sees encrypted blobs and never the actual messages.

Design a caching strategy for a high-traffic news site using Redis and NGINX. I want stale-while-revalidate logic implemented at the NGINX level with Lua scripts, and it needs to gracefully fall back to stale file cache if Redis goes down.

I need to implement OAuth2 with PKCE in a Vue 3 app. The tokens should be stored in memory only (not localStorage for security), and I need a silent refresh mechanism using an iframe or background worker to keep the session alive without being vulnerable to XSS.

Implement a Linux character device driver for a virtual FIFO with blocking I/O. If a process reads from an empty FIFO, put it to sleep with wait_event_interruptible and wake it when data is written. Handle SIGKILL gracefully while sleeping.

Write code to interface an SD card over SPI using DMA for block read/write operations. Implement the SD card initialization state machine from CMD0 through CMD8 to ACMD41 with proper timing, and include CRC7 verification for commands.

Develop a multi-threaded file server in C using the thread pool pattern with edge-triggered epoll. The main thread accepts connections and adds file descriptors to epoll, while worker threads pull ready events and do non-blocking I/O.

Build a Tailwind CSS plugin using matchUtilities to create a dynamic text-shadow utility that allows arbitrary values like text-shadow-[2px_2px_4px_red]. Also expose default theme values like shadow-sm and shadow-md in the config.

Write a log-structured file system in C where all writes append sequentially to the end of the disk for write performance. Implement a cleaner garbage collector thread that compacts old segments in the background.

Design a Holy Albatross layout using CSS Flexbox with container queries. The component should display as 3 columns if there's room but switch to a single column stack if the container is too narrow, using the flex-basis calculation hack or native @container queries.

Implement a virtual memory manager in C for a toy kernel with a 2-level paging scheme for x86. Include copy-on-write for fork() where pages are marked read-only and only duplicated when a write page fault occurs.

Implement a custom v-permission directive in Vue 3 that conditionally removes elements from the DOM based on user role. It needs to listen to a reactive UserStore and re-evaluate instantly if the role changes dynamically via WebSocket.

Create an Angular app with advanced routing using a custom UrlMatcher for regex patterns like product-{id}. Use a CanLoad guard that checks JWT permissions asynchronously and doesn't even download the lazy-loaded chunk if the user lacks permission.

Create a Dockerized Flask boilerplate with multi-stage builds. The first stage installs build dependencies and compiles wheels, the second copies only compiled wheels for a minimal distroless or Alpine image to reduce attack surface.

Implement a search page in Next.js App Router where search results are server components streamed to the client. Use a client component for the search input that updates URL query params, wrap results in Suspense, and use useTransition to keep old results visible while new ones fetch.

Implement CSS architecture using ITCSS with strictly organized imports: Settings, Tools, Generic, Elements, Objects, Components, Trumps. Explain where a grid system vs a card component vs a utility class belongs in this hierarchy.

Implement a SvelteKit blog with MDsveX and create a custom rehype plugin that automatically generates a table of contents from H2/H3 tags and injects it into the page data. Also add syntax highlighting with shiki using a custom theme that matches the user's dark/light mode preference, server-side rendered.

Build a themeable SvelteKit design system with a no-JS fallback. The theme toggle should work using a URL query param or CSS :target hack when JS is disabled, then hydrate the theme state without layout shift when JS loads.

Create a TCP/IP network stack from scratch in C with an ARP cache that has entry aging. Implement LRU eviction when the cache is full and handle ARP requests and replies for mapping IP addresses to MAC addresses.

Design a real-time Angular dashboard using a webSocket subject with a buffering strategy. High-frequency updates like stock ticks should be collected with bufferTime(200) and processed in chunks to prevent change detection from freezing the browser.

Build an Angular PWA with version control where the ServiceWorkerModule doesn't auto-update. Listen to SwUpdate.available and show a toast saying "New version available. Click to Reload." Only activate the new service worker when clicked.

Provide a Python data science boilerplate integrating Kedro for pipeline management. Define modular pipelines with inputs and outputs in catalog.yml and implement a hook that validates data schema with Great Expectations before nodes run.

Design a responsive UI kit using Turborepo where Package A is core logic and Package B is React components. Make Package B tree-shakeable with sideEffects false and export individual CSS modules for each component.

Implement a CSS-only carousel with scroll-snap-type and accessibility. Add a small bit of JavaScript using IntersectionObserver to detect the active slide and update dot pagination indicators. Make sure keyboard tab navigation works logically.
Generate all unique permutations of a multiset without generating duplicates and filtering. Use backtracking with a frequency map or sorting to skip duplicate branches before entering them.

Create a Vue.js plugin for global error handling using app.config.errorHandler. Capture component errors, promise rejections, and API errors. Deduplicate similar errors within 1 second before sending to a logging service to prevent flooding.

Implement a Unix-like permission model for a toy filesystem using capability-based security. Instead of ACLs, processes must possess specific tokens to access resources. Implement token inheritance for child processes and token revocation.

Generate a React Native boilerplate with CodePush for OTA updates. The CI pipeline should release a JS bundle update on push to main, but force a native binary build if native dependencies in package.json changed.

Generate a T3 Stack boilerplate with Next.js, tRPC, and Prisma. Implement rate limiting on tRPC procedures using upstash/ratelimit and add a protected procedure middleware that verifies sessions and throws typed tRPC errors if invalid.

Build a Next.js app with GraphQL using GraphQL Code Generator for typed hooks with TypedDocumentNode. Implement optimistic UI updates in the Apollo cache for a Like mutation that toggles instantly before the server responds and rolls back on error.

Create a masonry layout using grid-template-rows: masonry for Firefox with a JavaScript fallback for other browsers that calculates item heights and uses absolute positioning or CSS columns to pack items without vertical gaps.

Implement SvelteKit with headless CMS live preview where the CMS loads the site in an iframe. Use window.postMessage to send draft content from the CMS to the SvelteKit app, applying overrides to the store state instantly without page reload.

Provide a Ruby on Rails API boilerplate compliant with JSON:API standard using jsonapi-serializer. Implement compound documents with sideloading related resources via ?include=author,comments to reduce HTTP requests.
Develop a Tailwind plugin for fluid typography that generates utility classes using CSS clamp(). The formula should linearly interpolate font size between minimum and maximum viewport widths.

Provide a FastAPI + Celery boilerplate using RabbitMQ as the broker. Implement progress tracking where the API returns a task_id, the client polls a status endpoint, and the Celery task updates its state to Redis so the client can show a progress bar.

Implement A/B testing at the edge with Vercel or Cloudflare middleware. Check for an ab-test cookie, assign a variant randomly if missing, set the cookie, and rewrite the URL to the variant path with less than 10ms latency.

Develop an animated navigation menu using an SVG gooey effect filter with feGaussianBlur and feColorMatrix. When hovering over a menu item, a blob should morph and move to that item using spring physics or CSS variables.

Create a Bootstrap 5 admin panel with a dynamic theme switcher that swaps the stylesheet href to load a different theme file instead of just toggling a class. Persist the selection in localStorage to avoid flash of unstyled content.

Develop a SvelteKit e-commerce checkout that handles Stripe webhooks to fulfill orders. Verify the Stripe signature with the raw body and implement idempotency so duplicate webhook events don't create duplicate orders.

Implement dynamic server-side data fetching in SvelteKit using the handleFetch hook. Intercept all server-side fetch requests and inject an internal service-to-service API key or mTLS certificate automatically for internal microservice calls.

Write a concurrent hash map with lock striping like Java's ConcurrentHashMap. Divide the map into 16 segments each with its own read-write lock so multiple threads can write to different segments simultaneously without contention.

Generate a C# ASP.NET Core boilerplate with structured logging using Serilog sinking to Elasticsearch. Implement middleware that captures correlation IDs from request headers and attaches them to every log scope for distributed tracing.

Create a monorepo boilerplate using PNPM workspaces with shared tsconfig and eslintrc in a packages/config folder. The Next.js app in apps/web should import UI components from packages/ui with hot module replacement working across package boundaries.

Implement a multi-theme React system that listens to the system preference matchMedia for dark mode. If the user hasn't manually overridden the theme, automatically switch when the OS theme changes. Sync state across tabs using the storage event.

Create a custom form validation framework in vanilla JS using the native Constraint Validation API with setCustomValidity. Implement async validation like username availability that debounces input, sets a pending validity state, and updates the UI on completion.

Build a Flutter + Firebase boilerplate with Firestore security rules unit tests. Include a local emulator suite setup and a test script that verifies user A cannot read user B's private document before deployment.

Implement Vue routing guards with a dirty form guard. If the user tries to navigate away with unsaved changes, show a native browser confirm dialog. If they cancel, abort navigation. This must work for both in-app router pushes and browser back/forward buttons.

Build a Go microservice boilerplate with graceful shutdown. When receiving SIGTERM, stop accepting new requests, wait for active requests to finish with a timeout, and close database connections properly before exiting.

Create a CSS-only image gallery using container queries with the cq-fill technique. It should switch from 1-column to masonry based on container width and use scroll-driven animations to fade images in as they enter the viewport without any JavaScript.
Build a Node.js CLI tool boilerplate using Ink for React-based terminal UI with spinners and progress bars. Handle SIGINT to cleanup child processes if the user kills the CLI mid-operation.

Create a solution to detect deadlocks in a distributed system using the Chandy-Misra-Haas algorithm. Messages are passed between processes to determine if a cycle exists in the resource dependency graph.

Design a modular Pinia state management system with store hydration from localStorage with versioning. If saved state is version 1.0 and current app is 1.1, run a migration function to transform the old state structure before loading it into the store.

Find strongly connected components in a directed graph using Tarjan's algorithm with a single DFS pass and a stack to track low-link values. Handle a graph with 1 million nodes within 2 seconds using non-recursive DFS to avoid stack overflow.

Create a Kotlin Ktor boilerplate with WebSockets using the actor model. Each connected client spawns a coroutine actor, and a broadcast actor manages active clients and pushes messages to them concurrently.

Design a CSS architecture for legacy migration with a scoped reset. Create a .new-app class that resets all global styles from Bootstrap or Foundation inherited from the legacy parent page so new React components inside look consistent regardless of CSS pollution.

Build a Vue.js offline-first app using idb for IndexedDB. When creating a todo, write to IDB immediately and show it in the UI. A background sync manager should detect network restoration, push the queue to the API, and handle ID conflicts.

Create a CSS-only accordion using details and summary elements. Animate the height opening using the grid-template-rows 0fr to 1fr transition trick. Make sure Ctrl+F find works so the browser automatically expands the detail if searched text is hidden inside.

Implement a graph coloring algorithm using Welsh-Powell to minimize colors. Sort vertices by degree and return the chromatic number. Optimize adjacency matrix storage using a BitSet for memory efficiency.
Generate a Vue 3 + Vite boilerplate with unit testing using Vitest in a JSDOM environment. Mock API calls with MSW so tests don't hit real endpoints but simulate network latency and error states.

Create a Django boilerplate with tenant schemas using django-tenant-schemas. Route requests to specific PostgreSQL schemas based on subdomain and include a management command to migrate all tenant schemas in parallel.

Build a SvelteKit app with magic link auth without using a library. Generate a cryptographically secure token, store the hash in DB, email the link. In the callback, verify the token, create a session ID, store it in an HttpOnly Secure SameSite=Strict cookie, and handle token expiration.

Build an Angular component library with visual regression testing. Configure Storybook with Chromatic or a local Puppeteer script where CI fails if pixel difference exceeds 0.1%. Implement knobs where checking a box toggles a specific Angular directive on the component.

Design an algorithm to find the median of two sorted arrays with O(log(min(n,m))) time complexity. Use binary search on partition points, handle edge cases where one array is empty or arrays have uneven lengths, and provide a mathematical proof of correctness in comments.

Write a k-way merge algorithm for K sorted files too large to fit in RAM. Use a min-heap to efficiently select the smallest element from K active file buffers. Implement buffered I/O to read and write in 64KB chunks.

Schedule tasks with prerequisites using Kahn's algorithm. Detect if a cycle exists for invalid schedules. Output must support parallel execution groups identifying which tasks can run simultaneously at each step.

Design an Angular multi-language form validation system without separate translation files. Create a translation directive that wraps mat-error, accepts the error key like required or minlength with parameters, and interpolates the correct localized string dynamically.

Design a multi-theme responsive layout using CSS variable swap strategy. Define semantic colors in :root, redefine them in a .dark-theme class, and ensure smooth transitions between themes with transition on background-color.
Develop a multi-threaded C file server using sendfile() for zero-copy transfer directly from disk cache to network socket. Benchmark the CPU usage difference against a standard read/write loop.

Build a Next.js blog platform with ISR and on-demand revalidation. Create a secure API route that the headless CMS webhooks call with the specific slug changed, updating the static page instantly without waiting for a revalidation timer.

Create a reusable animation library using the Web Animations API. Create a standard animateEntry function that works on both DOM nodes and shadow DOM nodes, returns a Promise that resolves when finished, and handles prefers-reduced-motion automatically.

Create a CSS-only tooltip system using the CSS Anchor Positioning API. The tooltip should automatically flip to the top if there isn't enough space on the bottom. Provide a JavaScript fallback using floating-ui for browsers that don't support anchor positioning yet.
Solve the maximum subarray problem using Kadane's algorithm, then extend it to the maximum submatrix sum problem for an N x N matrix with O(N^3) complexity.

Build a Vue 3 app that exports framework-agnostic web components using defineCustomElement. Implement shadow DOM style injection where global Tailwind styles are extracted and injected into each component's shadow root at runtime so they work when embedded in a React app.

Implement internationalized routing in Next.js without the built-in i18n. Write custom middleware that detects geo-IP from Vercel headers and rewrites French users from /en to /fr unless they have a NEXT_LOCALE cookie overriding the geo-detection.

Create a landing page with parallax effects optimized for 60fps. Only use transform translate3d and opacity, use will-change sparingly, implement the update loop with requestAnimationFrame, and make sure event listeners are passive.

Implement a Next.js styling solution using Vanilla Extract for zero-runtime CSS-in-JS. Configure the build to output atomic CSS classes and implement a sprinkles configuration that restricts developers to only use values defined in the design token TypeScript theme.

Build an Elixir Phoenix boilerplate using Presence to track online users. Implement a cluster setup with libcluster so presence information syncs across distributed Erlang nodes automatically when deployed to multiple instances.

Solve the Traveling Salesman Problem using dynamic programming with bitmasking via the Held-Karp algorithm. Time complexity should be O(n^2 * 2^n). Optimize bitmask state storage to handle up to N=20 within reasonable memory limits.

Create a Rust web service boilerplate using SQLx for async database interaction. Implement the outbox pattern where saving a record also saves an event to an outbox table in the same transaction, with a background worker publishing to Kafka.

Design a Trie-based autocomplete system with fuzzy matching. If the user types aple, return apple. Implement recursive search allowing 1 or 2 insertions, deletions, or substitutions using Levenshtein distance while traversing the tree.

Implement a Vue app with SSR handling async data prefetching on the server. The server-entry.js must wait for all onServerPrefetch hooks to resolve and serialize state into window.__INITIAL_STATE__ to prevent the client from re-fetching and causing hydration mismatch.

Create a progressive image loading strategy using the Blurhash technique. The server computes a short hash string, the client decodes it into a small canvas placeholder immediately, then cross-fades to the full image once loaded. Package this in a reusable lazy-img web component.

Develop a SvelteKit site with FLIP animations across routes. When clicking a card in a grid on Route A, it should morph into the header of the detail page on Route B by calculating the bounding box delta and applying the inverse transform during navigation.

Build an Angular micro-frontend architecture using Module Federation that shares the Angular core singleton. If shell and remote both use Angular 17, share the runtime. If remote uses Angular 16, gracefully fallback to downloading its own runtime for version mismatch handling.
Provide a NestJS boilerplate with event sourcing using EventStoreDB. The write side appends events while a separate projection process reads the event stream and updates a MongoDB read view model.

Implement the Raft consensus algorithm leader election in Go. Handle the split vote scenario where two nodes candidate simultaneously using randomized election timeouts. Simulate network packet loss in tests to prove the system converges on a leader.

Create a Vue plugin for a typed event bus without using mitt. Use TypeScript mapped types so the $emit function autocompletes the payload type based on event name. Add a replay feature where new subscribers can request the last N events of a specific topic.
Design a skip list with probabilistic balancing. The insert operation flips a coin to determine new node tower height. Search, insert, and delete must achieve O(log n) average time complexity.

Find articulation points using DFS with discovery and low times. A vertex u is an articulation point if it has a child v with no back-edge from v or its descendants to an ancestor of u. Handle the special case for the DFS tree root.
Detect and correct errors using Hamming(7,4) codes. Take 4 data bits, generate 3 parity bits, introduce a single-bit flip error, and write logic to identify the exact error position and correct it.

Build a complex React form generator where the schema is a recursive JSON tree with conditional logic like show Field B if Field A is greater than 10. Implement the logic engine using topological sort to determine evaluation order so updates propagate correctly in a single render pass.
Compute strongly connected components using Kosaraju's algorithm with two DFS passes: one on the original graph for finish times, one on the transpose graph with reversed edges to find components.

Create an advanced React drag-and-drop kanban board with optimistic reordering. When a card is dropped, update local state instantly and send the new order to the backend. If validation fails like a locked board, rollback the UI with a toast error.
Implement a lock-free concurrent queue using atomic compare-and-swap operations. Implement the Michael-Scott queue algorithm and handle the ABA problem using generation counters or hazard pointers.

Build a Bloom Filter using Murmur3 and FNV-1a hash functions. Implement a counting Bloom filter variant using 4-bit counters instead of single bits to allow element deletion with a small probability of false negatives.

Implement a React chat app with GraphQL subscriptions that handles socket reconnection and missed messages. If the WebSocket drops for 10 seconds, queue outgoing messages, then on reconnection send the queue and request a catch-up query for missed messages using a cursor ID.

Implement Angular Universal API pre-rendering with a cache warming script. Before deploying, crawl the sitemap, trigger SSR render for each route, save HTML to Redis cache, and only switch the load balancer to the new deployment once 90% of high-traffic pages are cached.
Build a min-max stack that supports push, pop, min, and max operations all in O(1) time. Use auxiliary stacks to track historical min and max values at each level of the main stack.

Create a responsive Tailwind admin dashboard with container-based resizing. Charts using Chart.js should listen to their div container resize, not the window. Use a ResizeObserver hook to trigger chart redraws only when the layout panel actually changes size like on sidebar toggle.

Implement a multiplayer game backend in Node.js using UDP for player movement updates and TCP for chat and inventory. Implement client-side prediction and server reconciliation to hide latency, with the server keeping a buffer of the last 30 frames to validate move timestamps.

Build a SvelteKit + Prisma full-stack app with row level security simulation. Wrap the Prisma client in a proxy that automatically injects a where clause with tenantId from the user context into every find and update query to prevent data leaks.

Solve optimal matrix chain multiplication using dynamic programming. Construct a table m[i,j] for minimum scalar multiplications and reconstruct the optimal parenthesization from the s[i,j] split table.

Build a genetic algorithm for job shop scheduling. Define a custom crossover operator like Order Crossover OX1 that preserves relative task order to avoid invalid schedules. Implement elitism to keep the top 1% of solutions unchanged.

Implement a fully persistent segment tree where updates create a new path of O(log n) nodes pointing to the old structure instead of modifying existing nodes. Use this to solve range k-th smallest number queries.

Implement longest increasing subsequence using the patience sorting approach in O(n log n). Maintain a list of active pile tails and for each number binary search to find the first pile top >= the number and replace it, or start a new pile.

Solve the N-Queens puzzle using a bitwise solution. Use three integers for columns, left diagonals, and right diagonals to track safe positions instead of a 2D array. Show significant speedup over standard backtracking for N=14.

Implement parallel breadth-first search using a frontier-based approach. Multiple threads process the current frontier to generate the next frontier. Use atomic intrinsics to mark visited nodes in a shared BitSet without locking.

Implement Raft consensus focusing on log replication. The leader sends AppendEntries RPCs, followers check prevLogIndex and prevLogTerm, and on conflict the leader decrements nextIndex for that follower and retries until consistency.

Find bridges or critical connections in a network graph using Tarjan's bridge-finding algorithm. Use a single DFS traversal to compute discovery_time and low_link values where a bridge exists if low_link[child] > discovery_time[parent].

Implement option pricing with Monte Carlo simulation using geometric Brownian motion to price a European call option. Use NumPy for vectorization and compare convergence of 100k paths against the analytical Black-Scholes formula.

Develop an Angular app with reactive forms and a custom ControlValueAccessor for a complex multi-select dropdown with chips. It must integrate seamlessly with formControlName and support touched, dirty, and disabled states correctly.

Design a system to detect anomalies in a stream using the Isolation Forest algorithm from scratch. Build random binary trees from streaming data points and flag points with short path lengths as anomalies.

Create a leader election algorithm using the Bully algorithm. Processes have IDs and when one notices the leader is down, it sends ELECTION messages to higher ID processes. Handle network timeout scenarios robustly.

Find the majority element in a stream using the Boyer-Moore voting algorithm with O(1) auxiliary space and a single pass. Prove it guarantees finding the majority element if one exists with over 50% occurrence.

Clean and normalize text handling Unicode normalization. Convert to NFKD form to separate characters from diacritics, then use regex to strip combining marks to convert café to cafe while preserving other ASCII characters.
Implement approximate string matching using the Wagner-Fischer algorithm for Levenshtein distance. Optimize space from O(N*M) to O(min(N,M)) by only storing the previous two rows of the DP matrix.
Detect outliers using the interquartile range method with pandas. Calculate Q1 and Q3, define outliers as values below Q1 - 1.5*IQR or above Q3 + 1.5*IQR, and filter the dataset to remove these rows.

Implement the producer-consumer problem with a bounded blocking queue in C++ or Java using strictly mutex and condition variables. Handle spurious wakeup by wrapping wait in a while loop checking the buffer state.
Write a venv wrapper that checks if a venv folder exists and creates it if not. Detect the OS and output the correct shell command to activate the environment for Windows vs Posix systems.

Design Operational Transformation for text editing. Implement the transform(op1, op2) function handling insert vs insert, insert vs delete, and delete vs delete. Verify Transformation Property 1 that T(op1, op2) and T(op2, op1) result in the same document state.

Create a crypto price monitor using async websockets to connect to Binance or Coinbase public stream. Calculate a rolling moving average with a 1-minute window in real-time and trigger an alert if price deviates more than 2% from the average.
Download YouTube videos with yt-dlp and implement a progress hook. Display a custom CLI progress bar using tqdm that updates based on download bytes ratio from the yt-dlp callback dictionary.
Schedule periodic tasks with APScheduler using a SQLAlchemyJobStore so jobs persist across restarts. Create a job that runs every 2nd Friday of the month using a cron trigger expression.
Implement the Knuth-Morris-Pratt algorithm. First compute the longest prefix suffix array and explain in comments how it allows the search index to skip ahead without backtracking in the text string.

Build a CLI tool to organize files using pathlib with content-addressable storage logic. Rename files to their SHA-256 hash and detect duplicates by deleting the source if a target with the same hash already exists.
Compute the convex hull using the monotone chain algorithm. Sort points by X-coordinate then build the upper hull and lower hull separately in O(n) time after sorting.

Batch resize and watermark images using Pillow. The watermark should be a transparent PNG centered on the image using alpha composition, scaling proportionally to always be 20% of the target image width.

Create thumbnails maintaining aspect ratio. If the target box is 100x100 but the image is 200x100, resize to 100x50 and paste it centered on a 100x100 white background canvas for uniform output dimensions.

Generate QR codes with a logo image embedded in the center. Use high error correction and paste a logo over the center 20% of the QR code, ensuring it remains scannable due to error correction redundancy.

Create a distributed hash table implementing the Chord protocol lookup logic. Define the finger table structure for a node and implement find_successor that runs in O(log N) by jumping through finger table entries closest to the target ID.

Implement a simple chatbot with Levenshtein distance matching. Have a dictionary of predefined questions and find the key with lowest edit distance to the user query. Fallback to "I don't understand" if confidence is too low.
Convert Markdown to HTML by writing a custom extension for markdown-it-py. The extension should detect custom syntax like ::alert[text]:: and render it as a div with alert classes.

Generate secure passwords ensuring entropy with at least 1 uppercase, 1 lowercase, 1 digit, and 1 symbol. Generate candidates with secrets.choice, validate against regex, and regenerate until valid using rejection sampling.

Build a B+ tree with the split node logic. When inserting into a full leaf node, split it into two, push the middle key up to the parent, and ensure linked-list pointers between leaf nodes remain correct for range query traversal.
Parse Apache log files using regex named groups. Identify hotlinking attempts where the referer doesn't match your domain and the file extension is jpg or png. Output the top 10 offending IPs.

Build sentiment analysis from scratch with a Naive Bayes classifier without sklearn or NLTK. Train on a small hardcoded dataset of positive and negative sentences and implement Laplace smoothing for words not in the training set.
Merge PDFs using pypdf with bookmark and outline preservation. The output PDF must contain a table of contents pointing to the start page of each merged document.

Write database migrations using Alembic programmatically. Detect the current revision, generate a new migration script based on the difference between SQLAlchemy models and the DB, and apply the upgrade.
Send push notifications using Firebase Admin SDK with topic messaging. Subscribe device tokens to a specific topic and send high-priority data messages that wake up the app in the background.

Build an async GitHub client with aiohttp that fetches all repositories for a user. Implement an async iterator that transparently fetches the next page when the loop consumes the current batch, parsing the Link header for pagination.

Scrape hashtags using Twitter API v2 with Tweepy. Handle pagination using next_token, collect tweets until 1000 limit or token exhausted, and respect rate limit headers by sleeping when x-rate-limit-remaining hits 0.

Find shortest path in a city street network using NetworkX and OSMNX. Download the street graph from OpenStreetMap and calculate shortest path between GPS coordinates using Dijkstra weighted by travel time based on road speed limits.

Automate browser with Playwright implementing request interception. Abort image requests to speed up scraping and inject custom JavaScript into the page context to expose a hidden variable before scraping content.

Build a weather scraper for a site that loads data via JavaScript. Use Selenium Wire or inspect network traffic to identify the internal API endpoint and fetch JSON directly from that API instead of scraping the DOM.

Simulate a MapReduce framework using Python multiprocessing. Implement a generic map_reduce function that partitions input, spawns worker processes for map phase, shuffles and sorts intermediate keys, and runs reduce phase in parallel.

Plot stock trends by fetching OHLC data with yfinance. Verify with mplfinance then render a custom interactive candlestick chart using Plotly with a Bollinger Bands overlay calculated using pandas rolling standard deviation.

Send emails with attachments using smtplib and email.mime. Construct a MIME multipart message with both text/plain fallback and text/html body plus a PDF attachment encoded in base64. Handle TLS handshake explicitly.

Build an LFU cache with O(1) time complexity for both get and put. Use a dictionary mapping keys to nodes and a doubly linked list of doubly linked lists for frequency buckets to manage counts efficiently.

Encrypt files using Fernet symmetric encryption from cryptography. Derive the key from a user password using PBKDF2HMAC with a salt and 100,000 iterations. Prepend the unencrypted salt to the output file for later decryption.

Check website uptime using requests with a custom adapter. Configure the adapter to bind the source IP address for machines with multiple network interfaces. Measure time to first byte separately from full download time.
Split a large file using line-based splitting. Read in buffered chunks, scan for newline characters near chunk boundaries, and split exactly at line breaks so text lines aren't cut in half.

Build a Python REST API with JWT and implement a custom @require_role('admin') decorator that inspects request context, decodes the JWT, verifies the signature, and checks if the roles claim contains admin before executing the route.

Automate Git operations with GitPython. Scan a repository for stale branches not merged into main and untouched for over 6 months. Check if each branch is fully merged using git merge-base and delete if safe.
Implement Levenshtein distance with the iterative two matrix rows optimization. Store only current and previous row instead of the full matrix to reduce space complexity to O(min(n,m)).

Scrape and summarize news using Hugging Face Transformers with a distilbart-cnn model for abstractive summarization. Parse main content using readability-lxml to strip ads and navbars before feeding text to the model.

Find duplicate files optimized for speed. First group by file size, then for groups with multiple files compute MD5 hash of the first 4KB, and only if those match compute the full file hash to confirm duplication.

Convert text encodings by detecting source encoding with chardet. Stream the file in binary mode 4KB at a time, decode using detected encoding with replace for errors, and encode to UTF-8 in a new file.
Generate a minimal spanning tree using Prim's algorithm with a Fibonacci heap or pairing heap to optimize decrease-key to O(1) amortized time for total complexity O(E + V log V).

Build a raw async HTTP server using asyncio streams without Flask or FastAPI. Parse raw HTTP request bytes for method, path, and headers. Handle keep-alive connections where multiple requests come over the same TCP socket.

Build a Django REST Framework API with nested serializers supporting writable operations. The create method must handle saving parent objects and batch creating child objects from the payload in a single transaction.
Batch download from FTP using ftplib with TLS. Implement resume capability by checking local file size and sending the REST command to start transfer from the offset where it failed.

Backup to AWS S3 using boto3 with multipart upload for large files over 100MB. Split the file into chunks, upload them in parallel threads, and send the complete multipart upload request to assemble them on S3.

Simulate a banking system with double-entry bookkeeping. Every transfer creates two ledger entries: debit from Account A and credit to Account B. Use a context manager ensuring atomicity so if credit fails, debit is rolled back.
Build a SQLite contact manager with FTS5 full-text search. Create a virtual table to index contact notes and write queries performing BM25 ranked search returning snippets with matches highlighted.

Build a web crawler with a politeness policy. Parse robots.txt using urllib.robotparser and implement a token bucket rate limiter ensuring never more than 1 request per second per domain even when crawling multiple domains concurrently with asyncio.

Generate TOTP implementing RFC 6238 from scratch using hmac and struct without pyotp. Generate HMAC-SHA1 hash of the time counter, truncate dynamically, and output the 6-digit code verifiable with Google Authenticator.

Simulate two-phase commit with a coordinator and 3 participant classes. Implement prepare and commit phases and handle coordinator failure where if it crashes after sending prepare, participants must query each other to decide whether to abort or commit.
Implement seeking inside a gzip file. Since gzip is a stream, build an index of access points by reading once, allowing random access to specific blocks later without re-reading from the start.

Implement image classification with TensorFlow using transfer learning. Load pre-trained MobileNetV2 without the top layer, freeze base layers, add a custom dense layer for your classes, and train only the top layer.

Implement plagiarism detection using shingling and MinHash. Break documents into n-gram shingles, compute MinHash signatures, and estimate Jaccard similarity between documents to detect near-duplicates efficiently.

Validate email addresses with an RFC 5322 compliant regex handling quoted strings, domain literals, and comments. Wrap it in a function that also performs a DNS MX record lookup using dnspython to verify the domain can receive mail.
Generate a masked word cloud using a binary image silhouette as the mask. Place words only within the black regions using collision detection logic.
Control smart home via MQTT with state machine logic. Listen for motion sensor topics and if motion is detected between 6 PM and 6 AM with lux below 50, publish a message to turn on the lights.
Monitor file changes using epoll via pyinotify. Watch a directory recursively and wait for IN_CLOSE_WRITE events before triggering processing to avoid reading incomplete files.
Build a Twitter bot with a reply listener using the filtered stream endpoint to listen for mentions. Parse tweet text for command keywords like !help, perform the action, and reply to the thread.

Anonymize database data implementing k-anonymity. Generalize attributes like converting exact age to age ranges and suppress identifiers so every record is indistinguishable from at least k-1 other records.

Write pytest unit tests with parametrization and fixtures. Create a fixture that spins up a Docker container test database before the session and tears it down after. Use parametrize to run the same test against 20 different inputs.
Implement OCR with Tesseract using OpenCV preprocessing. Apply adaptive thresholding and deskewing to correct rotation before passing to Tesseract. Output results as HOCR preserving layout positions.

Generate PDF invoices using ReportLab with a table that has dynamic row heights. If items exceed one page, automatically create a second page, repeat the header, and draw the page X of Y footer correctly.
Parse large XML to JSON using streaming with lxml iterparse. Read element by element without loading the whole tree into RAM and clear processed elements from memory to keep footprint constant.

Fine-tune a BERT model for custom text classification using PyTorch. Implement a data loader that tokenizes input on the fly and save model checkpoints only when validation loss improves for early stopping.

Create an interactive Plotly 3D surface plot of a mathematical function. Add a slider widget that modifies function parameters in real-time, triggering client-side WebGL mesh updates without full page reloads.

Create an interactive Plotly Dash dashboard with a callback that updates a graph based on dropdown selection. The callback must be memoized on the server side using flask-caching so identical requests don't recompute heavy aggregations.

Build a Flask URL shortener with Base62 encoding for ID generation. Handle hash collisions, use Redis to cache redirects for sub-millisecond latency, and implement click analytics with a background worker logging referrer and user-agent asynchronously to ClickHouse.

Build a price comparison scraper handling dynamic selectors. Don't rely on brittle XPath selectors - search the DOM for currency symbols and use heuristics like font size and proximity to add-to-cart buttons to identify prices robustly.
Build a REST API client CLI with click. Implement output formatting with a --format flag allowing json, yaml, or pretty-printed ASCII table output using tabulate.

Manage Docker containers with the SDK to perform blue/green deployment. Identify the running blue container, spin up green, wait for healthcheck to pass, update Nginx config to point to green, then stop blue.
Generate a PDF/A-3 compliant invoice using ReportLab. Embed raw XML invoice data inside the PDF file itself following the ZUGFeRD standard so it's both human-readable and machine-readable.

Scrape financial ratios from Yahoo Finance including cash flow statement and balance sheet. Calculate the Altman Z-Score for bankruptcy risk prediction by combining multiple fields and handle missing data gracefully.

Detect faces with MediaPipe Face Mesh instead of just bounding boxes. Overlay the 468 facial landmarks in real-time on a webcam stream and implement blink detection by calculating the aspect ratio of eye landmarks.

Build a simple blockchain with proof of work. The mine_block function must find a nonce where the SHA-256 hash starts with 4 zeros. Verify chain integrity by recalculating hashes of all previous blocks.
Get live sports scores using SSE client or efficient long-polling. Implement delta updates storing previous game state and printing only changes like goal notifications to minimize console noise.
Automate SSH with paramiko implementing agent forwarding. Connect to a bastion host then hop to a private instance to execute commands. Handle SSHException for unknown host keys with auto-add policy.

Generate random test data with Faker including a custom provider for a specific domain like medical codes. Create a CSV with 1 million rows maintaining referential integrity where patient IDs in visits must exist in patients.

Visualize a network with NetworkX using force-directed Fruchterman-Reingold layout. Calculate node positions where edges act as springs and nodes repel like magnets. Animate the layout convergence step by step.

Build a job listing scraper handling pagination and infinite scroll. Detect when the next button is disabled and use a Bloom filter to track seen job IDs to prevent re-scraping listings that appear on multiple pages.

Optimize Conway's Game of Life using NumPy convolution. Represent the grid as a matrix and compute neighbor counts for all cells simultaneously using a 3x3 kernel convolution, updating the grid in a vectorized operation.

Build a raw WebSocket chat server with asyncio and websockets library. Implement heartbeat ping/pong logic to detect zombie connections and maintain a registry of rooms broadcasting messages only to subscribed sockets.
Build fraud detection handling imbalanced data with SMOTE to generate synthetic fraud cases. Train an XGBoost classifier and evaluate with area under precision-recall curve, not accuracy.
Automate incremental backups using rsync logic or mtime checking. Create hard links for unchanged files in new backup folders so each backup looks like a full snapshot but consumes minimal storage.

Create a real-time data plot with PyQtGraph for speed. Build a scrolling strip chart with a 10,000 point buffer. As new data arrives at 100Hz, update the vertex array in GPU memory without reallocating.

Simulate traffic flow with the Nagel-Schreckenberg cellular automaton model. Simulate a single-lane circular road with acceleration, deceleration, randomization, and movement rules. Visualize traffic jams emerging from nowhere.

Fetch emails via IMAP using imaplib with IDLE mode for push email. Send the IDLE command and block until the server pushes a new email notification, then wake up and fetch immediately instead of polling.
Analyze genetic data by implementing the Burrows-Wheeler Transform used in DNA alignment. Write the function to transform a genome string into its BWT form for easier compression and searching.

Build a chatbot with GPT API using retrieval-augmented generation. Chunk a large text file into 500-token segments with overlap, generate embeddings, store in a local FAISS index, and retrieve top-3 chunks to inject into the system prompt as context.

Build an MQTT sensor visualizer with paho-mqtt. Run a subscriber thread pushing messages into a priority queue prioritizing critical alerts, and a visualizer thread using matplotlib animation to plot temperature data in real-time.

Build a scrape and translate pipeline with backpressure using async queues. The scraper is faster than the translator so limit queue size and pause the scraper when full. Handle translation API rate limits by sleeping the consumer.
Solve a maze with A* search using Manhattan distance as the heuristic. Represent the maze as a grid and output the path visually by drawing the solution line on the maze image with Pillow.

Implement Flask-Login with session fixation protection. Regenerate session ID on login and implement fresh login requirement forcing password re-entry for sensitive routes if the session is stale over 5 minutes.

Create an API gateway with token bucket rate limiting using Redis Lua scripts. The script must run atomically to ensure concurrent requests from the same IP don't exceed the limit and return the correct X-RateLimit-Remaining header.
Implement collaborative filtering with matrix factorization using SVD. Predict ratings for unseen items by computing the dot product of user and item vectors in the latent space.
Write a JSON schema validator from scratch supporting type, properties, required, and nested objects and arrays. Don't use the jsonschema library - implement recursive validation logic manually.
Analyze audio by extracting mel-frequency cepstral coefficients with librosa. Visualize audio as a spectrogram and implement silence removal based on decibel thresholding before processing.
Generate MIDI music using Markov chains. Analyze existing MIDI files to learn note transition probabilities, generate new melodies by walking the chain, and output as a .mid file using mido.

Build a data entry form filler handling dynamic CAPTCHAs. When a CAPTCHA appears, screenshot the element, send to a local ML model or external API, get the text, and input it. Use Selenium with undetected_chromedriver.

Manage IoT devices with a digital twin synchronization pattern. The cloud maintains desired and reported state JSON documents. Write logic to compute the delta and generate commands to transition the device from reported to desired state.
Build a task manager app using event sourcing. Don't store current state - store a log of events like TaskCreated and TaskCompleted. Replay events in memory on startup to reconstruct UI state.

Implement basic image compression with discrete cosine transform from scratch like JPEG. Break images into 8x8 blocks, apply DCT, quantize coefficients, and visualize the blockiness vs size trade-off by adjusting the quantization table.

Extract TF-IDF keywords using MapReduce style logic. The map phase counts word frequencies per document, reduce aggregates global document frequencies. Calculate TF-IDF for a 10GB corpus without loading everything into RAM.
Write a custom Ansible module in Python that checks systemd service status, verifies SHA256 hash of the binary, and only restarts the service if the binary on disk differs from the running version.

Analyze the Gricean implicature when asked if John is a good programmer and answered that he is punctual with nice handwriting. Identify which maxim is flouted and explain the conversational implicature that John is a bad programmer.
Write a Pulumi dynamic provider in Python managing a mock resource like a local text file. Implement create, read, update, and delete methods that Pulumi calls during pulumi up.

Monitor network traffic using eBPF via the bcc library. Write a C kernel probe counting TCP packets on a specific port and a Python userspace script reading the map and printing throughput every second.
Address the Gettier problem showing justified true belief is insufficient. Provide a counter-example like the broken clock case and propose a fourth condition to fix the definition of knowledge.

Build a web chat app with Tornado implementing long polling for legacy clients. Hold HTTP requests open until a new message arrives or timeout occurs, simulating real-time delivery without WebSockets.
Build anomaly detection with a PyTorch autoencoder trained on normal data only. Define anomaly as any input where reconstruction error exceeds a threshold like the 99th percentile of training error.
Define justice using Rawls' veil of ignorance. Propose a tax policy justified by assuming you could be born as the poorest member of society. Contrast with Nozickian libertarian entitlement theory.

Analyze disk usage by implementing a Merkle tree. Recursively scan directories computing file hashes where directory hashes are hashes of children's hashes, allowing rapid detection of which sub-branch changed between scans.

Convert CSV to SQLite with type inference. Read the first 1000 rows analyzing each column to determine if it's integer, float, date, or text. Generate the CREATE TABLE statement dynamically with correct types before bulk inserting.

Optimize YOLO object detection for video inference using multiprocessing. Decouple frame reading from inference with a queue and implement frame skipping to drop old frames and jump to latest when inference falls behind real-time.

Draw the X-bar syntax tree for "The scientist with the glasses proved the theory quickly" with strict binary branching. Treat "with the glasses" as an N-bar adjunct and "quickly" as a V-bar adjunct. Label all specifiers, heads, and complements.
Analyze data with Dask creating a custom computation graph with complex DAG dependencies. Visualize the execution graph and ensure computation spills to disk if memory limit is exceeded.
Derive the wave equation for the electric field in vacuum from Maxwell's equations. Use the curl of curl identity and show the wave speed equals c.

Implement speech to text with local Whisper and speaker diarization. After transcribing, use clustering on audio embeddings with pyannote.audio to label which segments belong to Speaker A vs Speaker B.

Implement TextRank for text summarization. Split text into sentences, compute similarity based on shared words, build a graph with similarity edges, run PageRank, and select top-ranked sentences for the summary.
Implement fuzz testing that generates random malformed binary inputs to test a file parser. Monitor for segmentation faults and log the specific input seed that caused each crash.
Derive the four Maxwell relations from the four thermodynamic potentials. Write the differential forms and apply the condition for exact differentials using the equality of mixed partial derivatives.

Build a movie recommender with alternating least squares for matrix factorization. Build a user-item rating matrix and iteratively fix the user matrix to solve for items and vice versa until RMSE converges.

Implement Six Degrees of Wikipedia search. Starting from a source page, perform bidirectional BFS to find the shortest path of links to a target page. Handle request concurrency limits to avoid IP bans.

Prove using Cantor's diagonal argument that the set of infinite binary sequences is uncountable. Assume a countable enumeration, construct the diagonal sequence that differs at each position, and show it can't be in the enumeration.
Prove Lagrange's theorem that subgroup order divides group order. Use left cosets to show they partition the group with equal size by defining a bijection between the subgroup and any coset.

Evaluate the improper integral of x^2/(x^2+1)^2 from negative to positive infinity using contour integration. State the semicircle contour, calculate the residue at the pole of order 2, and show the arc integral vanishes as radius approaches infinity.

Analyze whether humans are inherently good or evil through Hannah Arendt's banality of evil. Argue against the monstrosity view and discuss how bureaucratic systems dissociate individuals from moral consequences.

Implement language detection using character n-gram frequency profiling. Train profiles on Wikipedia dumps for 5 languages and detect new sentences by calculating cosine similarity between their n-gram vectors and language profiles.

Compare correspondence, coherence, and pragmatic theories of truth. Apply each to the statement "The King of France is bald" and analyze how each handles truth values for statements about non-existent subjects.
Compute the fundamental group of the circle and prove it's isomorphic to the integers. Use covering spaces with the exponential map and the path lifting property to demonstrate the winding number.
